languages.text: Вивисектор Мартинакс, оставшийся руководить хирургеонами Сектора Бионика, служил на флагмане до конца своих дней. Когда возраст и усталость забрали у Вивисектора его силы и талант, он был с почетом обращен в медицинский сервочереп генетором Ферренцом и продолжил свой труд на благо Вольного Торговца.

Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship until the end of his days. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue toiling for the benefit of the Rogue Trader.
languages.original_text: Вивисектор Мартинакс, оставшийся руководить хирургеонами Сектора Бионика, служил на флагмане до конца своих дней. Когда возраст и усталость забрали у Вивисектора его силы и талант, он был с почетом обращен в медицинский сервочереп генетором Ферренцом и продолжил свой труд на благо Вольного Торговца.

traits.locale_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship until the end of his days. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue toiling for the benefit of the Rogue Trader.

Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship until the end of his days. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue toiling for the benefit of the Rogue Trader.

Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship until the end of his days. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue toiling for the benefit of the Rogue Trader.

Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship as long as his hands could hold a scalpel. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue his work for the Rogue Trader.

Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship as long as his hands could hold a scalpel. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue his work for the Rogue Trader.

languages.text: セクター・ビオニカの外科医たちを任されたヴィヴィセクターのマルティナクスは、その生涯の終わりまで旗艦に仕えた。老齢と疲労がその力と才能を奪ったとき、ヴィヴィセクターの亡骸は、ジェネターのフェレンツによる医療用サーヴォスカルの作製に用いられた。この大いなる栄誉により、彼はローグトレーダーのために働き続けることができたのである。
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship until the end of his days. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue toiling for the benefit of the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: バイオニカ・セクターの外科医長に任命されたマルタナスは、旗艦で手術を続ける。手先が衰え、老いと疲労が彼の才能を奪った時、彼はジェネター・フェレンツに敬意をもって奉仕者として迎えられ、ローグ・トレーダーのために働き続けた。
セクター・ビオニカの外科医たちを任されたヴィヴィセクターのマルティナクスは、その生涯の終わりまで旗艦に仕えた。老齢と疲労がその力と才能を奪ったとき、ヴィヴィセクターの亡骸は、ジェネターのフェレンツによる医療用サーヴォスカルの作製に用いられた。この大いなる栄誉により、彼はローグトレーダーのために働き続けることができたのである。

languages.text: 解剖者马丁纳克斯被委任管理仿生区医务，一直在旗舰上服役直至生命终结。在衰老夺走他的力量与才华后，基因士费伦茨将他的遗骸改造成了医疗伺服头骨。这份莫大的荣耀，使他得以继续为行商浪人劳作。
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship until the end of his days. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue toiling for the benefit of the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: 解剖者马丁纳克斯被委任管理仿生区医务，一直在旗舰上服役直至生命终结。在衰老夺走他的力量与才华后，基因士费伦茨将他的遗骸改造成了医疗伺服头骨。这份莫大的荣耀，使他得以继续为行商浪人劳作。

languages.text: Le vivisecteur Martinax, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, servit à bord du vaisseau amiral jusqu'à la fin de ses jours. Lorsque l'âge et la fatigue finirent par lui ôter sa force et son talent, le genetor Ferrenz se servit de son corps pour créer un servocrâne médical, un insigne honneur qui lui permit de continuer à œuvrer pour le {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}.
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship until the end of his days. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue toiling for the benefit of the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: Le vivisecteur Martinax, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, servit à bord du vaisseau amiral jusqu'à la fin de ses jours. Lorsque l'âge et la fatigue finirent par lui ôter sa force et son talent, le genetor Ferrenz se servit de son corps pour créer un servocrâne médical, un insigne honneur qui lui permit de continuer à œuvrer pour le {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}.

Le vivisecteur Martinax, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, servit à bord du vaisseau amiral aussi longtemps que ses mains purent tenir un scalpel. Lorsque l'âge et la fatigue finirent par lui ôter sa force et son talent, le genetor Ferrenz se servit de son corps pour créer un servocrâne médical, un grand honneur qui lui permet de continuer à œuvrer pour le {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}.

languages.text: El vivisector Martinax, a cargo de los cirujanos del Sector Bionica, sirvió en la nave insignia hasta el fin de sus días. Cuando la edad y el agotamiento le arrebataron las fuerzas y el talento, el genetor Ferrenz utilizó los restos del vivisector para crear un servocráneo de medicae. Este gran honor le permitió continuar su ardua labor al servicio {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente.
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship until the end of his days. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue toiling for the benefit of the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: El vivisector Martinax, a cargo de los cirujanos del Sector Bionica, sirvió en la nave insignia hasta el fin de sus días. Cuando la edad y el agotamiento le arrebataron las fuerzas y el talento, el genetor Ferrenz utilizó los restos del vivisector para crear un servocráneo de medicae. Este gran honor le permitió continuar su ardua labor al servicio {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente.

languages.text: Sektör Biyonika cerrahlarının sorumluluğuna bırakılan Dirikesimci Martinax, elleri neşter tutabildiği sürece sancak gemisinde hizmet etti. Ölünceye dek Dirikesimci'nin kalıntıları Genetör Ferrenz'ce bir sıhhiye hizmeletinin yaratımında kullanıldı. Bu büyük onur, Hür Tacir'e hizmet için çabalarını sürdürmesini sağladı.
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship until the end of his days. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue toiling for the benefit of the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: Sektör Biyonika cerrahlarının sorumluluğuna bırakılan Dirikesimci Martinax, elleri neşter tutabildiği sürece sancak gemisinde hizmet etti. Ölünceye dek Dirikesimci'nin kalıntıları Genetör Ferrenz'ce bir sıhhiye hizmeletinin yaratımında kullanıldı. Bu büyük onur, Hür Tacir'e hizmet için çabalarını sürdürmesini sağladı.

languages.text: Vivisektor Martinax, der nun für die Chirurgeums des Sektors Bionica verantwortlich war, diente auf dem Flaggschiff bis ans Ende seiner Tage. Als ihn Alter und Erschöpfung seiner Kraft und Fähigkeiten beraubten, stellte Genetor Ferrenz aus den Überresten des Vivisektors einen Medicae-Servoschädel her. Diese große Ehre ermöglichte ihm, weiter für das Wohl {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} zu arbeiten.
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship until the end of his days. This great honour allowed him to continue toiling for the benefit of the Rogue Trader.
